title: Responsive CSS, Reflow, Progressive Enhancement, and Performance Budgets · Behavior Case: Progressive Enhancement
summary: Generated pages assume one viewport, content clips at zoom, navigation depends on JavaScript, fonts block text, images shift layout, and a fast home page hides slow long-form routes. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the progressive enhancement increment in responsive progressively enhanced performance budget. Learners progress through prediction…
objectives: Deliver core reading and navigation in HTML, layer CSS and optional JavaScript, and define failure behavior for blocked or broken enhancements.
Verify 320 CSS-pixel reflow, 200 and 400 percent zoom, text spacing, long tokens, code, tables, and translated content without two-dimensional page scrolling.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. A defensible solution applies Progressive Enhancement, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to responsive progressively enhanced performance budget.

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-responsive-performance-5
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-responsive-performance-5.
# Case 9036: an offline-first field documentation build.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: zoom a translated long-form page to 400 percent at mobile width with images and code blocks.
def worked_static_site_responsive_performance_5(viewports: int = 3, reflow_passes: int = 3, page_kib: int = 180, page_budget_kib: int = 220, layout_shifts: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "readerworked5",
        "source9036",
        "parse5dekrow",
        "routeworked59036",
        "artifact9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if viewports < 3 or reflow_passes < 0:
        return False, reflow_passes, "viewport-matrix"
    if reflow_passes != viewports:
        return False, reflow_passes, "reflow-failure"
    if page_kib < 0 or page_kib > page_budget_kib:
        return False, page_kib, "resource-budget"
    if layout_shifts > 0:
        return False, layout_shifts, "layout-instability"
    assert reflow_passes == viewports
    return True, page_kib, "responsive-budget"

steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Progressive Enhancement: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory publishing team handles case 4853 during an accessibility-led community newsroom release. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate representative pages on reflow, progressive enhancement, and resource budgets; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then replace a trusted author fixture with untrusted raw HTML, unsafe URLs, and an active SVG. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Deliver core reading and navigation in HTML, layer CSS and optional JavaScript, and define failure behavior for blocked or broken enhancements.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Progressive Enhancement model · Theory Progressive Enh….
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Progressive Enhancement model · Theory Progressive Enh…, keep Progressive Enhancement connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Deliver core reading and navigation in HTML, layer CSS and optional JavaScript, and define failure behavior for blocked or broken enhancements.

Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Deliver core reading and navigation in HTML, layer CSS and optional JavaScript, and define failure behavior for blocked or broken enhancements.

For Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Progressive Enhancement model · Theory Progressive Enh…, challenge the documented misconception with changed-source, delimiter, Unicode, nesting, route, URL, asset, viewport, cache, security, deployment, recovery, and controlled production-transfer evidence: A static site is progressively enhanced because its files are static.
